summary: QA review accepted FOUNDATION-003. The fixed 30-day command sequence produces identical state hash 61e0ba1c through the Node runner and Worker-compatible adapter path; sim-core remains platform-free and deterministic; protocol DTOs are explicit JSON-serializable structures; reviewed source scope stays within allowed F003 files plus lead-owned task/message metadata.

tests_run.result: Confirmed branch chore/foundation-003-deterministic-hello. Source changes are package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, apps/sim-runner/**, apps/web/src/worker/**, packages/protocol/**, packages/sim-core/**, plus lead-owned task/thread/message metadata.
Lockfile was up to date and dependencies materialized successfully for all 7 workspace projects.
Ran architecture:check and sim:determinism; architecture boundaries passed and both Node and Worker-compatible paths produced hash 61e0ba1c for 30 days.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c; deterministic hello simulation matched for 30 days.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check completed successfully.

tests_run.command: rg -n "\b(import|from)\b|require\(|node:|fs|path|react|pixi|electron|DOM|document|window|self|postMessage|Math\.random|Date\.now|performance\.now|new Date|process|crypto" packages/sim-core packages/protocol apps/sim-runner apps/web/src/worker package.json
tests_run.result: Matches show sim-core imports only @monsoon/protocol; Node process usage is confined to apps/sim-runner, and the worker adapter has no DOM, Node IO, React, Pixi, Electron, Math.random, Date.now, or performance.now usage.

tests_run.command: rg -n "\bany\b|!\.|!;| as unknown as |enum\b|namespace\b|TODO|FIXME|skip\(|\.only\(" packages/sim-core packages/protocol apps/sim-runner apps/web/src/worker
tests_run.result: No matches found for banned any/non-null/double-assertion/enum/namespace/TODO/skipped-test patterns in reviewed source paths.

Filtered untracked source files are apps/sim-runner/package.json, apps/sim-runner/src/run-determinism.mjs, apps/web/src/worker/hello-simulation-adapter.mjs, packages/protocol/package.json, packages/protocol/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/package.json, packages/sim-core/src/index.ts, and expected route/handoff metadata.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e <DTO JSON round-trip smoke from apps/sim-runner>
tests_run.result: Request and result survived JSON stringify/parse round-trip; commandCount=30, hash=61e0ba1c, requestSerializable=true, resultSerializable=true.

decisions: ACCEPT: fixed 30-day command sequence is created by packages/protocol and deterministically reaches state hash 61e0ba1c through both Node direct sim-core execution and the Worker-compatible adapter path.

ACCEPT: sim-core imports only @monsoon/protocol and uses deterministic integer/string operations; no DOM, Node IO, React, Pixi, Electron, filesystem, Math.random, Date.now, or performance.now usage was found in sim-core.

ACCEPT: protocol request, command, and result DTOs are explicit readonly TypeScript structures with protocolVersion, literal command kind/seed/actor/tone fields, numeric day/delta/result fields, and JSON-serializable arrays/strings/numbers.
ACCEPT: root package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml changes are acceptable scope because the task requires the root pnpm sim:determinism script and workspace lockfile entries.

ACCEPT: the Worker path is an adapter rather than a real browser Worker bootstrap, but this is acceptable for FOUNDATION-003 because docs/04 allows in-process adapters for tests, the active task acceptance criteria are hash equality and no DOM/Node IO in simulation, and the handoff records the limitation explicitly.
risks: The implementation does not yet prove execution inside a real Chrome Dedicated Worker; FOUNDATION-004/FOUNDATION-005 should add a browser Worker bootstrap or contract/e2e coverage when the web package boundary exists.

Running pnpm install --frozen-lockfile in this checkout generated untracked node_modules folders because no ignore rule appears to cover them; these were excluded from source scope review and should be handled separately from FOUNDATION-003 if repository hygiene is addressed.
requested_action: Record QA acceptance for FOUNDATION-003 and route the next lead-owned workflow step.
